content.name: Pokey's Shield Mod Rebalance
content.description: Rebalances shield equipment mods into real choices. No roll RNG (every value pinned) and clear archetypes: Bastion (capacity), Regenerator (recharge rate), Resilient (delay), Bulwark (balanced). Capacity trades against refill speed, an honest choice. Higher tiers always upgrade. Numbers only, savegame-safe. Other mods untouched.
content.author: Pokey

text.name: Pokey's Shield Mod Rebalance
text.description: Rebalances shield equipment mods into real choices. No roll RNG (every value pinned) and clear archetypes: Bastion (capacity), Regenerator (recharge rate), Resilient (delay), Bulwark (balanced). Capacity trades against refill speed, an honest choice. Higher tiers always upgrade. Numbers only, savegame-safe. Other mods untouched.
text.author: Pokey
